notes: Speculation leading to Great Depression; initial ~$0.1B securities, later ~$1B in 1932
Policy tightening; freed reserves via requirement cuts and gold desterilization
Flash crash, mild inflation; quick recovery, no major liquidity ops
Inflation surge; post-recession easing via rate cuts and base expansion

Program trading, USD weakening pre-crash; discount window and open market ops
